content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1-4.5.3 WARN — Push entitlement is used to implement automated hourly promotional notifications ("scheduleHourlyDeals", repeats:true, interval=3600) explicitly advertised in metadata as "unlimited notifications, all day long" (App/NotificationScheduler.swift; fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt).
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits using push notifications for spam or unsolicited promotional blasts (4.5.3), and marketing pushes require explicit opt-in consent UI plus an opt-out mechanism (4.5.4) — neither is visible here, just a hardcoded hourly repeating trigger. This pattern (unlimited hourly marketing pushes advertised in the description) is a classic reviewer red flag likely to trigger rejection or questions. Recommend adding explicit in-app consent language, a user-configurable frequency/opt-out, and toning down the "unlimited/every hour" marketing claim.
